panels.description: Wide shot: Alice is sitting near the edge of the pool, looking distressed and speaking to the Mouse (off-panel or small in the frame). Background shows the watery setting of the pool. Alice has a worried, slightly pleading expression.

bubbles.text: A little bright-eyed terrier, with oh, such long curly brown hair! And it'll fetch things when you throw them, and it'll sit up and beg for its dinner, and all sorts—I can't remember half of them—and it belongs to a farmer, you know, and he says it's so useful, it's worth a hundred pounds! He says it kills all the rats and—oh dear!
I'm afraid I've offended it again!

panels.description: Medium close-up: Alice looking back toward where the Mouse departed, hands slightly outstretched in a conciliatory gesture. Soft, slightly apologetic lighting.

bubbles.text: Mouse dear! Do come back again, and we won't talk about cats or dogs either, if you don't like them!
Let us get to the shore, and then I'll tell you my history, and you'll understand why it is I hate cats and dogs.

panels.description: Wide shot: The bank of the pool, revealing the 'queer-looking party.' Alice stands amidst a group of dripping wet creatures: a Duck, a Dodo, a Lory, and an Eaglet. All look miserable and ruffled. Wet, dreary lighting.
Medium shot focusing on the group of wet animals (Duck, Dodo, Lory, Eaglet). Their feathers/fur are plastered down. Expressions are universally cross and uncomfortable. Focus on the shared misery.

Medium shot: Alice, looking somewhat resigned but pragmatic, gesturing slightly towards the group as if beginning to organize them. The Mouse should be visible, perhaps near her knee, establishing authority.
Medium close-up: A character (perhaps Dodo or Duck, asserting false confidence) leaning in aggressively, looking determined and slightly manic. Dynamic angle suggesting action.

bubbles.text: I'll soon make you dry enough!

panels.description: Close up on the Mouse, standing tall (relatively) and looking serious, hands clasped, demanding attention from the assembled group (implied audience outside the frame). High importance expression.

bubbles.text: Sit down, all of you, and listen to me!
